method: incognito camoufox-stealth (context cleared), sidebar recs on last 3 published videos of @voidlinedocs

sidebar_observations.our_video: What Did CROATOAN Mean? (1587) — The Lost Colony of Roanoke
The Day the Siberian Sky Exploded — Tunguska 1908
9 Hikers Vanished in the Russian Snow. The 2021 Answer.

blindspot: Channel too new/small (1-115 views per video) for YouTube's co-watch graph to surface established niche leaders in the sidebar. Recs skew to generic FR 'Pour vous' entertainment (SQUEEZIE, MrBeast commentary, talk shows) plus a handful of small AI-narrated/dubbed mystery channels never seen before (Historic Mysteries Untold, AI Discovery, Dark Centuries, Stone & Bone, Origins Future, History & Hearsay, The Secret). None of these are large/stable enough to serve as this month's deep-scan target vs the established default seed.
decision: Kept default seed per SKILL.md fallback rule (first run, no reliable co-watch signal yet).
